channel.title: Cursor Blog
channel.description: Cursor Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Coinbase reduces time from idea to production by 90% with Cursor
item.description: Over 2,400 developers at Coinbase use Cursor as a part of an agent-first engineering model. 75% of all PRs are created by agents, with the average engineer merging 55% more PRs since the beginning of the year.

item.title: How Notion used the Cursor SDK to embed coding agents
item.description: You can now delegate tasks to Cursor directly from Notion. Notion built the integration in weeks using the Cursor SDK.

item.title: Reward hacking is swamping model intelligence gains
item.description: On SWE-bench Pro, 63% of successful Opus 4.8 Max resolutions retrieved the fix rather than derived it. Stricter eval harnesses show how benchmark scores can conflate coding ability with answer retrieval.

item.title: Build from anywhere with Cursor for iOS
item.description: Cursor is available as a native iOS app on your phone, now in public beta.
